segments.text: Parsley is absolutely cooking right now!
segments.original_text: パセリならぬノリノリパセリが今爆発しています

segments.text: Yeah, there's tons of dressing on this!
segments.original_text: そうですね、これはドレッシングいっぱい付いてますね

segments.text: Yeah, the flavor is incredibly strong
segments.original_text: ですね、味が非常に濃いという
一つミームも付け加えておきましょう

segments.text: Now on the attack, seizing the momentum!
segments.original_text: さあ攻めに回り、流れを取り

segments.text: Parsley, once he had the advantage,
segments.original_text: 展開を取ったパセリマンが

segments.text: We've never seen him stop once he's rolling!
segments.original_text: 止まったところを我々は見たことがありません

full_text: Parsley is absolutely cooking right now! Yeah, there's tons of dressing on this! Yeah, the flavor is incredibly strong Let's add another meme! Bair! Now on the attack, seizing the momentum! Parsley, once he had the advantage, We've never seen him stop once he's rolling! Is he closing this out?! He closes it! 3-0 sweep!

corrections.original: セミに回り、流れを通り
corrections.corrected: 攻めに回り、流れを取り
corrections.rule: misheard: セミ→攻め, 通り→取り
